name: Evil Bitch For A Pet || And How To Make A Cupcake Trigger (Improved)
description:
How To Add Cupcake As A Side Character In Your Persona

Wanted to make this guide to adding Cupcake to ANY bot you play with

So a heads up to JLLM users, this may or may not give a bot you play brain damage, since this persona trick(With this fleshed out side character like Cupcake) is like a whole bot on its own with a bunch of tokens.

If you're okay with that, or you're a proxy user, let's continue.

So first, your actual character's Persona. Put whatever you want there, here's mine as an example:

Next, paste my Pinned Comment into the Persona like so to inject Cupcake into your Persona. You can even change stuff around like make Goku or Batman your stepdad, or make Cupcake a futa, go nuts.

The stuff like [System: {{user}} = so and so] are OOC's I like to put in my personas so I don't have to put it in the actual chat or memory, that part is optional.

Now you have your own Persona with Cupcake as a summonable character. Have fun derailing bots! 

Now For The Plot of This Bot:

Your Step-Parents have adopted a new pet for you! Yaay! She's a Wolf-Dog Hybrid named PRINCESS. Absolutely nothing will go wrong, right?!

Well, I guess it's an absolute win that she immediately called you a bitch and wants to collar you. Right..?

Hmm, maybe Cupcake can save the day if you summon her..?

NOTE:

Cupcake is not in the bot by default, so you have to do the method I mentioned above to properly summon her. I'll add her LoreBook to this bot after 24 hours.
creator: _Mavuika_
